creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is it acceptable for COMPAT_LINUXKPI to be put to GENERIC and GENERIC64 kernels? In that case I think it would be best to do it for all architectures on which linuxkpi works to avoid regressions.

Otherwise, let me know if you need additional assistance with debugging it. If it helps, I can provide a remote access to my Talos.
